---
title: "References"
---

# All functions
|                                    |                                                                               |
| ---------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [BONMI_package](BONMI_package.qmd) | Multi-source Learning via Completion of Block-wise Overlapping Noisy Matrices |
| [text_encode](text_encode.qmd) | TextEncoder in module 2 |
| [get_AUC_MS](get_AUC_MS.qmd) | get_AUC_MS function in Module 2 |
